Name: Exit Intent: Is there a final engagement offer or incentive before the user leaves?
Finding: There is no exit intent mechanism, missing a last opportunity to capture the user before they leave.
Recommendation: Install an exit-intent popup app (e.g., Privy, OptiMonk) with a discount or email capture offer

Name: Thumb-Zone: Are primary CTAs (Add to Cart, Checkout) reachable within the thumb zone?
Finding: Primary CTAs are outside the natural thumb reach zone on mobile, reducing tap rates.
Recommendation: Place primary CTAs in the lower 50% of the screen on mobile within natural thumb reach

Name: Input Font Size: Are search and form inputs at least 16px to prevent iOS auto-zoom?
Finding: Input fields are smaller than 16px, triggering iOS auto-zoom and disrupting the mobile experience.
Recommendation: Set all input font sizes to 16px minimum via CSS

Name: Mobile Navigation: Does the hamburger menu and any mega-menu collapse cleanly on mobile?
Finding: The mobile menu does not collapse cleanly, making navigation difficult on small screens.
Recommendation: Test all navigation states on mobile and fix any overflow or collapse issues

Name: Third-Party Scripts: Are chat widgets, pixels, and tracking scripts deferred?
Finding: Third-party scripts are not deferred, blocking page render and slowing load time.
Recommendation: Audit third-party scripts and defer or async-load non-critical ones

Name: App Bloat: Are there unused or redundant Shopify apps still installed?
Finding: Unused apps are still installed, injecting unnecessary scripts and slowing the store.
Recommendation: Audit installed apps and uninstall any that are unused or duplicated

Name: Image Format: Are hero and product images served in WebP format?
Finding: Images are not served in WebP format, resulting in unnecessarily large file sizes.
Recommendation: Convert images to WebP format or use a Shopify app to auto-serve WebP

Name: LCP: Does the hero image or main headline load within 2.5 seconds?
Finding: The Largest Contentful Paint exceeds 2.5 seconds, failing Core Web Vitals.
Recommendation: Preload the hero image and ensure it is properly sized and compressed

Name: No Content Shifting: Does the layout remain stable while the page loads?
Finding: Layout shifts significantly while loading, creating a jarring experience.
Recommendation: Set explicit width and height attributes on all images and embeds

Name: Page Speed: Does the site load in under 3 seconds on mobile?
Finding: The site takes longer than 3 seconds to load on mobile, significantly increasing bounce rate.
Recommendation: Compress all images, defer non-critical scripts, and uninstall unused apps

Name: Stock Status: Are out-of-stock variants clearly grayed out or disabled?
Finding: Out-of-stock variants are not clearly grayed out, causing confusion.
Recommendation: Update theme code to disable unavailable variant combinations

Name: Order Confirmation Email: Does the automated email arrive promptly with all key info?
Finding: The order confirmation email is missing key info including tracking, returns, and support contact.
Recommendation: Customize the Order Confirmation email to include tracking link, return policy, and contact info

Name: Variant Clarity: Is it obvious which size or color is currently selected?
Finding: It is not obvious which size or color is currently selected.
Recommendation: Use swatches or button-style selectors instead of dropdown menus

Name: Post-Purchase Page: Is the Thank You page clear about what happens next?
Finding: The Thank You page does not explain next steps, leaving customers uncertain.
Recommendation: Customize the Order Confirmation page with a thank you note, delivery timeline, and contact info

Name: Above-the-Fold CTA: Is the Add to Cart button visible without scrolling?
Finding: The Add to Cart button is not visible without scrolling, reducing impulse purchases.
Recommendation: Adjust page layout or reduce white space to pull the CTA above the fold

Name: Abandoned Checkout Recovery: Is automated abandoned checkout email or SMS enabled?
Finding: Abandoned checkout recovery is not enabled, leaving recoverable revenue on the table.
Recommendation: Enable abandoned checkout emails under Settings then Notifications

Name: High-Res Images: Can users zoom in or see high-quality product details?
Finding: Users cannot zoom in or view high-quality product details.
Recommendation: Upload images at 2048x2048px and enable zoom in theme settings

Name: Checkout Branding: Does the checkout page reflect the brand (logo, colors, banner)?
Finding: The checkout page lacks brand identity, reducing trust and brand cohesion.
Recommendation: Customize the checkout page via Settings then Checkout then Customize checkout

Name: Grid Consistency: Do all product images share the same aspect ratio?
Finding: Product images have inconsistent aspect ratios, creating a broken grid.
Recommendation: Enable image cropping and aspect ratio enforcement in theme settings

Name: Error Handling: Are validation error messages clearly highlighted and actionable?
Finding: Error messages are not clearly highlighted, causing confusion during checkout.
Recommendation: Adjust theme styling to ensure error states are high-contrast and descriptive

Name: Quick Add / View: Can users add to cart without leaving the collection page?
Finding: There is no way to add to cart without leaving the collection page.
Recommendation: Enable Quick Add or Quick View buttons on product cards

Name: Order Summary Toggle (Mobile): Is the total price easy to view on mobile?
Finding: The order total is difficult to view on mobile without expanding the order summary.
Recommendation: Ensure the order summary is expanded or clearly tappable on mobile

Name: Price Visibility: Are sale prices clearly distinguished from regular prices?
Finding: Sale prices are not clearly distinguished from regular prices.
Recommendation: Style compare-at prices with a strikethrough and contrasting color

Name: Auto-fill Support: Are checkout form fields optimized for browser auto-fill?
Finding: Checkout is not optimized for auto-fill, slowing down the purchase process.
Recommendation: Standardize form field names and labels to ensure browser auto-fill functions correctly

Name: Secondary Hover Image: Does hovering over a product card reveal a second image?
Finding: Hovering over product cards does not reveal a second image.
Recommendation: Enable Show second image on hover in product card settings

Name: Express Checkout: Are Shop Pay and Apple Pay buttons prominent above the fold?
Finding: Shop Pay and Apple Pay buttons are not prominent, missing a significant one-tap checkout opportunity.
Recommendation: Enable Accelerated Checkouts under Settings then Payments

Name: Product Count: Does the page show the number of items in the collection?
Finding: Page does not show how many items are in the collection.
Recommendation: Add a Showing X products Liquid tag to the collection header

Name: Breadcrumb Progress: Does the user know which checkout step they are on?
Finding: Users cannot see their current stage in checkout, increasing anxiety and drop-off.
Recommendation: Enable the standard Shopify checkout progress indicator

Name: Sorting Options: Are sorting controls (Price, Newest, Best Selling) available?
Finding: Sorting controls are missing, making it hard for users to find the right product.
Recommendation: Enable the sorting dropdown in collection template settings

Name: Guest Checkout: Can users check out without creating an account?
Finding: Users are required to create an account to check out, significantly increasing drop-off.
Recommendation: Set Customer Accounts to Optional in Shopify Admin under Settings then Checkout

Name: Active Filters: Is it immediately clear which filters are currently applied?
Finding: It is not clear which filters are currently applied.
Recommendation: Add Active Filter tags with an X to remove individual filters

Name: Sticky CTA (Mobile): Does the checkout button remain visible as users scroll the cart?
Finding: The checkout button is not sticky on mobile, requiring users to scroll back to proceed.
Recommendation: Add a sticky checkout button to the cart drawer or page on mobile

Name: Filter Logic: Are filters (Size, Color, etc.) collapsible on mobile?
Finding: Filters are not collapsible on mobile, crowding the screen.
Recommendation: Use Shopify Search and Discovery app to optimize and collapse filters on mobile

Name: Upsells / Cross-sells: Are there relevant add-on product suggestions in the cart?
Finding: There are no product suggestions in the cart, missing upsell revenue.
Recommendation: Install a cart upsell app (e.g., Candy Rack, ReConvert) or enable product recommendations

Name: Breadcrumbs: Can users navigate back to the previous category?
Finding: Users cannot easily navigate back to the previous category.
Recommendation: Install a breadcrumb snippet or enable breadcrumbs in theme settings

Name: Free Shipping Bar: Is there a progress bar showing how close the user is to free shipping?
Finding: There is no free shipping progress bar, missing a high-impact AOV lever.
Recommendation: Install a free shipping progress bar app or add custom Liquid logic

Name: Clear Titles: Does the collection H1 clearly describe what is being sold?
Finding: The collection H1 does not clearly describe what is being sold.
Recommendation: Ensure collection titles are descriptive and SEO-friendly

Name: Shipping Calculator: Does the cart estimate shipping costs before checkout?
Finding: The cart does not estimate shipping costs, leading to abandoned checkouts from unexpected fees.
Recommendation: Add a shipping rate calculator block to the cart page or drawer

Name: 404 Page: Does the 404 error page provide clear navigation options?
Finding: The 404 page does not provide navigation options, causing dead ends.
Recommendation: Edit 404.json template to include a Continue Shopping button

Name: Trust Badges: Are payment provider icons and secure checkout badges visible in the cart?
Finding: Payment icons and secure badges are not visible in the cart, reducing trust at a critical moment.
Recommendation: Add payment provider icons (Visa, Mastercard, Shop Pay, etc.) to the cart footer

Name: Social Links: Do social icons open in a new tab?
Finding: Social icons do not open in a new tab, navigating users away from the store.
Recommendation: Add target=_blank to social media icon links

Name: Discount Field: Is it obvious where to enter a discount code?
Finding: It is not clear where to enter a discount code, causing customer frustration.
Recommendation: Add a note that discount codes can be applied at checkout

Name: Footer Policies: Are legal and policy pages easy to find in the footer?
Finding: Legal and policy pages are difficult to find, reducing buyer trust.
Recommendation: Add a Policies menu to the footer section

Name: Empty State: Does an empty cart suggest products to browse?
Finding: An empty cart does not suggest products, creating a dead end.
Recommendation: Add a Recommended Products or Continue Shopping section to the cart-empty template

Name: Tap Targets: Are all buttons and links at least 44x44px on mobile?
Finding: Buttons or links are smaller than 44x44px, causing tap errors on mobile.
Recommendation: Add padding to mobile navigation and buttons via CSS

Name: Quantity Adjustment: Can users change item quantities directly in the cart?
Finding: Users cannot change quantities directly in the cart.
Recommendation: Add plus and minus quantity buttons to cart line items

Name: Readability: Is the body text at least 16px?
Finding: Body text is smaller than 16px, reducing readability.
Recommendation: Update global typography settings in the theme editor

Name: Order Summary: Are product names, variants, and quantities clearly shown in the cart?
Finding: Product names and variants are not clearly displayed in the cart, causing confusion.
Recommendation: Ensure line item properties (name, variant, qty) are visible in the cart template

Name: Typography Hierarchy: Is there a clear visual difference between heading levels?
Finding: There is no clear visual difference between heading levels, reducing scannability.
Recommendation: Adjust CSS font-weights and sizes for H1 vs H2 vs body

Name: Cart Trigger: Does the cart open automatically as a drawer when an item is added?
Finding: Cart does not open automatically upon adding an item, reducing conversion momentum.
Recommendation: Enable Drawer or Slide-out Cart in theme cart settings

Name: Logo Link: Does clicking the logo return the user to the homepage?
Finding: Clicking the logo does not return the user to the homepage.
Recommendation: Verify link destination in header.liquid

Name: Inventory Urgency: Is low-stock messaging (Only X left) surfaced to the user?
Finding: Low-stock messaging is not surfaced, missing an opportunity to create purchase urgency.
Recommendation: Add a low-stock Liquid snippet near the CTA when inventory is low

Name: Predictive Search: Does the search suggest products and collections?
Finding: Search does not suggest products or collections, slowing product discovery.
Recommendation: Enable Shopify Predictive Search in theme settings

Name: User Reviews: Is there a photo review section below the product details?
Finding: There is no photo review section, reducing buyer confidence.
Recommendation: Enable photo uploads in the review app settings

Name: Search Visibility: Is the search bar clearly visible on mobile?
Finding: Search bar is not clearly visible on mobile, increasing friction for product discovery.
Recommendation: Adjust header layout to show a search bar (not just an icon) on mobile

Name: Social Proof: Are star ratings and review counts visible near the product title?
Finding: Star ratings are not visible near the product title, reducing social proof.
Recommendation: Install a review app and add the star rating snippet near the product title

Name: Sticky Header: Does the header remain visible on scroll-up?
Finding: Header does not remain visible on scroll-up, making navigation difficult.
Recommendation: Enable "Sticky Header" in theme settings

Name: Description Tabs: Is long product information organized into collapsible accordions?
Finding: Long product info is not organized into accordions, creating an overwhelming wall of text.
Recommendation: Use theme blocks to create collapsible info sections for Details, Shipping, and Care

Name: Value Props: Are shipping and returns info displayed near the CTA?
Finding: Shipping and returns info is not displayed near the CTA, reducing buyer confidence.
Recommendation: Add a Shipping and Returns accordion or icon block near the CTA

Name: Price Placement: Is the price positioned immediately above the Add to Cart button?
Finding: The price is not positioned near the CTA, breaking the decision-making flow.
Recommendation: Rearrange product blocks so price appears directly above Add to Cart
